title: cylindria rubra
intro: Cylindria rubra, also known as Red Raisin or Red Columbo, is a type of flowering plant in the genus Rubia, native to Asia and Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cylindria rubra include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant to protect the body from free radicals. Cylindria rubra can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
